name: Baked Ricotta
intro:
This is a really delicious way to prepare ricotta. It looks very inviting and can be served on its own or as part of an antipasto.

It keeps well for a few days in the fridge.
method: Mix all the ingredients together well in a bowl. Butter an ovenproof dish, place the mixture in the dish and bake for about 25 minutes until golden and puffed up.
You can eat this dish hot, but it has more flavour when cold.
You can buy fresh ricotta at your deli or supermarket. Make sure you buy the full-cream milk ricotta and not the fat-reduced version.
